title: Roar of the Dragon
writer: Howard Estabrook, George Kibbe Turner, Merian C. Cooper
actors: Richard Dix, Gwili Andre, Edward Everett Horton
plot: A boatload of Westerners is trapped in Manchuria as bandits led by Russian renegade Voronsky ravage the area. Seeking refuge in a fortified inn, the group is led by the boat's Captain Carson, who becomes involved with a woman who ...
